project_style.name: Fallen Angel Noir
project_style.description: Dark fantasy cinematic music video style. High contrast, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, volumetric light rays (God rays). Muted color palette dominated by deep blacks, purples, and antique silver, with sharp teal light accents. Cinematic film grain and slight motion blur.
project_style.consistency_tokens: cinematic, dark fantasy, dramatic lighting, high contrast, teal accents, film grain
